double_action.name: Double Action
double_action.description: 25% chance to take an extra main action

triple_action.name: Triple Action
triple_action.description: 10% chance to take two extra main actions

lifesteal.name: Lifesteal
lifesteal.description: On hit: heal for 10% of damage dealt

lifesteal_physical.name: Physical Lifesteal
lifesteal_physical.description: On physical hit: heal for 15% of damage dealt

spell_lifesteal.name: Spell Lifesteal
spell_lifesteal.description: On magic hit: heal for 12% of damage dealt

mana_drain.name: Mana Drain
mana_drain.description: On hit: drain 8 MP from target, restore to self

mana_burn.name: Mana Burn
mana_burn.description: On hit: burn 12 MP, deal 80% of burned MP as Chaos damage

bash.name: Bash
bash.description: 25% on physical hit: stun target for 1 turn

cleave.name: Cleave
cleave.description: Melee hits deal 35% damage to units adjacent to target

chain_lightning_proc.name: Chain Lightning Proc
chain_lightning_proc.description: 30% on hit: deal 12 Lightning damage to a random enemy

bleed_on_hit.name: Bleed on Hit
bleed_on_hit.description: On physical hit: apply Bleed (4/turn, 3 turns)

frostbite_on_hit.name: Frostbite on Hit
frostbite_on_hit.description: On Water hit: apply Frostbite (3/turn, -1 move, 2 turns)

slow_on_hit.name: Slow on Hit
slow_on_hit.description: On hit: apply Slow (-1 movement, 2 turns)

root_on_hit.name: Root on Hit
root_on_hit.description: 20% on hit: Root target for 1 turn

silence_on_hit.name: Silence on Hit
silence_on_hit.description: 15% on hit: Silence target for 2 turns

fury_swipes.name: Fury Swipes
fury_swipes.description: Each consecutive hit on same target: +3 bonus damage (stacks to 10)

desolation_armor_break.name: Armor Break
desolation_armor_break.description: On hit: reduce target DR by 3 for 3 turns

skadi_slow.name: Frost Slow
skadi_slow.description: On hit: Slow + reduce healing received by 40% for 2 turns

mark_on_hit.name: Mark Target
mark_on_hit.description: On hit: Mark target (takes +15% damage from all sources, 3 turns)

reflect_physical.name: Physical Reflect
reflect_physical.description: Reflect 20% of physical damage received to attacker

reflect_magic.name: Magic Reflect
reflect_magic.description: Reflect 30% of magic damage received to attacker

reflect_all.name: Damage Reflect (All)
reflect_all.description: Reflect 15% of all damage received to attacker

counter_melee.name: Melee Counter
counter_melee.description: When hit by adjacent physical attacker: counter for 75% damage

counter_any.name: Counter Attack
counter_any.description: 30% chance when hit: counter for 50% damage

damage_block.name: Damage Block
damage_block.description: Block 8 flat damage from each hit

counter_helix.name: Counter Helix
counter_helix.description: 20% when hit: deal 10 Physical damage to all adjacent units

backtrack.name: Backtrack
backtrack.description: 15% chance to completely negate incoming damage

guardian_shield.name: Guardian Shield
guardian_shield.description: Intercept 50% of damage dealt to adjacent allies (you take it instead)

borrowed_time.name: Borrowed Time
borrowed_time.description: Below 25% HP: all damage heals you instead (2 turns)

heal_on_kill.name: Heal on Kill
heal_on_kill.description: On kill: heal 15% of max HP

mp_on_kill.name: MP on Kill
mp_on_kill.description: On kill: restore 10% of max MP

haste_on_kill.name: Haste on Kill
haste_on_kill.description: On kill: gain Haste (+1 move, +5 initiative) for 2 turns

berserk_on_kill.name: Berserk on Kill
berserk_on_kill.description: On kill: gain Berserk (+20% damage, -10% defense, 2 turns)

raise_dead.name: Raise Dead
raise_dead.description: 20% on kill: raise enemy as undead ally (30% HP, 5 turns)

soul_harvest.name: Soul Harvest
soul_harvest.description: On kill: gain a soul stack (+1 INT per stack, permanent)

cooldown_reset_on_kill.name: Reset on Kill
cooldown_reset_on_kill.description: On kill: reset all skill cooldowns

death_explosion.name: Death Explosion
death_explosion.description: On death: explode for 20% max HP Fire damage to adjacent units

death_curse.name: Death Curse
death_curse.description: On death: curse killer (8 Dark damage/turn, -50% healing, 5 turns)

death_heal_allies.name: Martyrdom
death_heal_allies.description: On death: heal all allies for 25% of your max HP

death_buff_allies.name: Vengeful Spirit
death_buff_allies.description: On death: all allies gain Berserk +30% for 3 turns

crit_stun.name: Stunning Crit
crit_stun.description: On critical hit: stun target for 1 turn

crit_bleed.name: Hemorrhage Crit
crit_bleed.description: On critical hit: apply heavy Bleed (6/turn, 3 turns)

crit_extra_action.name: Crit Extra Action
crit_extra_action.description: 25% on crit: gain an extra main action

counter_on_dodge.name: Riposte
counter_on_dodge.description: On dodging a melee attack: counter for 80% damage

haste_on_dodge.name: Blur Dash
haste_on_dodge.description: On dodge: gain Haste for 1 turn

fire_trail.name: Fire Trail
fire_trail.description: Leave fire terrain behind when moving (lasts 3 turns)

caltrops.name: Caltrops
caltrops.description: Leave thorns terrain behind when moving (lasts 5 turns)

regen_hp.name: HP Regen
regen_hp.description: Turn start: heal 3% of max HP

regen_mp.name: MP Regen
regen_mp.description: Turn start: restore 3% of max MP

poison_dot.name: Poison DoT
poison_dot.description: Take 4 Nature damage per turn (stacks up to 3)

bleed_dot.name: Bleed DoT
bleed_dot.description: Take 4 Physical damage per turn (worsens on movement)

shock_dot.name: Shock DoT
shock_dot.description: Take 4 Lightning damage per turn (chance to skip QTE)

curse_dot.name: Curse DoT
curse_dot.description: Take 5 Dark damage per turn + healing reduced 50%

corrode_dot.name: Corrode DoT
corrode_dot.description: Take 3 Earth damage per turn + DR reduced by 1/turn

radiance_burn.name: Radiance Burn
radiance_burn.description: Turn end: deal 6 Fire damage to all adjacent enemies

degen_aura.name: Degeneration Aura
degen_aura.description: Turn end: adjacent enemies lose 2% max HP

ambush_bonus.name: Ambush
ambush_bonus.description: Battle start: gain Haste (2 turns) + Stealth (1 turn)

opening_shield.name: Opening Shield
opening_shield.description: Battle start: gain a shield for 20% max HP (3 turns)

battle_cry.name: Battle Cry
battle_cry.description: Battle start: all allies gain Focus (+5 accuracy, +5% crit, 3 turns)

berserk_low_hp.name: Last Stand Berserk
berserk_low_hp.description: Below 30% HP: gain Berserk (+30% damage, -15% defense)

emergency_shield.name: Emergency Shield
emergency_shield.description: Below 20% HP: gain shield for 25% max HP (once per battle)

auto_revive.name: Auto Revive
auto_revive.description: On death: revive at 30% HP (once per battle)

parasitic_seed.name: Parasitic Seed
parasitic_seed.description: Attach a seed: drain 15 HP/turn, heal all allies for amount drained

vampiric_embrace.name: Vampiric Embrace
vampiric_embrace.description: Drain 20% of damage dealt as HP, restore 30% of drain as MP

spell_steal.name: Spell Steal
spell_steal.description: When hit by magic: steal a random buff from the caster

doom_apply.name: Doom
doom_apply.description: Apply Doom: die in 3 turns + all passives disabled. Cleanse with Light/Purify

link_share.name: Soul Link
link_share.description: Link two units: share 50% of all damage taken between them (4 turns)

execute_low_hp.name: Execute
execute_low_hp.description: On hit: instantly kill targets below 15% HP

adapt_element.name: Elemental Adaptation
adapt_element.description: After taking elemental damage: gain resistance to that element (3 turns)

vampiric_aura.name: Vampiric Aura
vampiric_aura.description: Physical attacks heal for 8% of damage dealt (aura — affects nearby allies)

sacrifice_heal.name: Blood Sacrifice
sacrifice_heal.description: On skill use: lose 10% max HP, heal lowest HP ally for 200% of that

echo_strike.name: Echo Strike
echo_strike.description: 30% on hit: repeat the attack for 60% damage

terrain_create_fire.name: Create Fire Zone
terrain_create_fire.description: Create fire terrain at target location (3 turns)

terrain_create_ice.name: Create Ice Zone
terrain_create_ice.description: Create ice terrain at target location (-1 movement, 3 turns)

terrain_create_poison.name: Create Poison Zone
terrain_create_poison.description: Create poison terrain at target location (4 turns)

knockback_hit.name: Knockback
knockback_hit.description: On physical hit: push target back 2 cells

pull_on_hit.name: Hook Pull
pull_on_hit.description: On hit: pull target 3 cells closer

swap_on_hit.name: Position Swap
swap_on_hit.description: 20% on hit: swap positions with target

dispel_buffs.name: Purge Buffs
dispel_buffs.description: On hit: remove up to 2 buffs from target

self_cleanse.name: Self Cleanse
self_cleanse.description: 30% turn start: remove 1 debuff from self

ally_cleanse.name: Purify Ally
ally_cleanse.description: On skill use: remove up to 2 debuffs from the lowest HP ally

stealth_passive.name: Stealth
stealth_passive.description: Start battle in stealth (untargetable until you attack)

taunt_passive.name: Taunt Aura
taunt_passive.description: Battle start: force all enemies to target you for 2 turns

gold_bonus.name: Gold Bonus
gold_bonus.description: On kill: gain bonus gold (value = bonus gold amount)

jp_bonus.name: JP Bonus
jp_bonus.description: On kill: gain bonus Jester Points
